description.value:
The weapon of choice for duelists and swashbucklers. Long, slender, and supremely precise, the rapier rewards fighters who commit fully to its use â€” punishing armor and keeping the blade in constant motion.

Training

LevelProperties
UntrainedOne-Handed, Finesse, Melee d6, Piercing
BasicOne-Handed, Finesse, Melee d8, Puncture, Riposte
MasterOne-Handed, Finesse, Melee d8, Puncture, Riposte â€” all bonuses apply
Master PerkIf wielding only a rapier (no shield or other weapon), add d4 to your damage rolls. If dual wielding with a Light weapon, gain +1 to AC from weapon deflection.

rmeData.masterPerk: If wielding only a rapier (no shield or other weapon), add d4 to your damage rolls. If dual wielding with a Light weapon, gain +1 to AC from weapon deflection.
